CREATE TABLE group_data (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT id, var_pop(value) FROM group_data GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (group_id INT, score FLOAT);
SELECT a.group_id, var_pop(a.score) FROM additional_data a JOIN group_data g ON a.group_id = g.id GROUP BY a.group_id;
SELECT var_pop(subquery.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value > 2.0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE values_one (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (cat VARCHAR, num FLOAT);
SELECT cat, var_pop(num) FROM mixed_data GROUP BY cat;
SELECT AVG(var_pop(subquery.value)) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data GROUP BY value) AS subquery;
